mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) as id, 'MEETING' as type, title as title, ai_keywords as highlightContent, create_time as createTime FROM biz_meeting WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (title LIKE #{keyword} OR ai_keywords LIKE #{keyword})

SELECT m.*, u.username FROM biz_meeting m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.user_id = u.id
( m.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY ${sortField} ${sortOrder}
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
